$comment: swarm-v1 kill-gate defaults. The scheduler and reviewer-auto agents read this at startup AND each DAG node can override via its own kill_gate field. Design: docs/exec-plans/active/swarm-v1-design-2026-04-11.md §6 invariants 4, 10.

bias.note: Design §11.1: weeks 1–2 reviewer-auto should bias toward REVISE over PASS. We track this as an explicit knob so Phase 3 can relax.

reviewer_bias_modes.strict: prefer REVISE when unsure — false PASS breaks main, false REVISE costs one iteration
reviewer_bias_modes.balanced: evenly weighted — use after 3 weeks stable in strict mode
reviewer_bias_modes.permissive: prefer PASS when unsure — only after Phase 4, never before

cost_ceiling.note: Design §9 #6. Without this, WIP=10 can produce 7-figure KRW surprise bills.
